differences.title: 1. PRIMARY FOCUS
differences.leftDesc: Designed for building dynamic, interactive web applications.
differences.rightDesc: Built for fast, static content delivery with islands.

differences.title: 2. REACTIVITY
differences.leftDesc: Svelte compiles components to imperative vanilla JS.
differences.rightDesc: Astro ships zero JS by default for UI.

differences.title: 3. DATA FETCHING
differences.leftDesc: Built-in functions for fetching data on server.
differences.rightDesc: Fetch data server-side or client-side with adapters.

differences.title: 4. UI APPROACH
differences.leftDesc: Focuses on reusable components across the app.
differences.rightDesc: Isolates interactive parts, static everywhere else.

differences.title: 5. ROUTING
differences.leftDesc: Automatic routing based on file structure.
differences.rightDesc: Automatic routing based on file structure.

differences.title: 6. ADAPTABILITY
differences.leftDesc: Supports various backend and deployment targets easily.
differences.rightDesc: Wide range of deployment options for static output.

differences.title: 7. PERFORMANCE
differences.leftDesc: Compiles away framework code for small bundles.
differences.rightDesc: Ships minimal/no JavaScript for blazing fast loads.
